title: tanacetopsis freitagii
intro: Tanacetopsis freitagii, also known as Freitag's tansy, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to New Guinea. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antifungal, and antibacterial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Tanacetopsis freitagii is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion to utilize its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
